raw_consumer_statement: While vacationing in XXXX XXXX in XX/XX/year>, we took a cab ride of less than 3 miles. The cab driver refused to take XXXX 's and asked for a credit card to pay for the short cab ride. When we returned to the US, our credit card statement, from Barclay 's reflected a charge of {$3500.00}. We notified Barclay 's immediately regarding this incorrect fee charged and asked for a new card asap and asked the Barclay 's fraud department to open an investigation into this overcharged transaction. We received the new card, and asked Barclay 's to investigate the incorrect charge of {$3500.00}. Barclay 's initially credited our account the {$3500.00}, however, at the end of XXXX debited our credit card the {$3500.00}. At this time, we are asking Barclay 's fraud department to reopen the fraud case we filed for a second time. Barclay 's told us the reopened fraud case will be reviewed again, with an estimated completion date of XX/XX/XXXX.
